obligations.source_quote: Before making a high-risk AI system available on the market, distributors shall verify that it bears the required CE marking, that it is accompanied by a copy of the EU declaration of conformity referred to in Article 47 and instructions for use, and that the provider and the importer of that system, as applicable, have complied with their respective obligations as laid down in Article 16, points (b) and (c) and Article 23(3).
obligations.addressee_note: Distributor making a high-risk AI system available on the market

decomposed_atoms.description: Distributor must verify CE marking is present
decomposed_atoms.requirement: Distributors SHALL verify the system bears the required CE marking

decomposed_atoms.description: Distributor must verify EU declaration and instructions for use accompany the system
decomposed_atoms.requirement: Distributors SHALL verify the system is accompanied by EU declaration of conformity and instructions for use

decomposed_atoms.description: Distributor must verify provider and importer have met their identification obligations
decomposed_atoms.requirement: Distributors SHALL verify that provider (Art. 16(b)(c)) and importer (Art. 23(3)) have complied with their obligations

automation_assessment.what_to_scan: Distribution compliance checklist, CE marking verification, documentation completeness records

obligations.scope_limitation: Only applies to distributors of high-risk AI systems

obligations.source_quote: Where a distributor considers or has reason to consider, on the basis of the information in its possession, that a high-risk AI system is not in conformity with the requirements set out in Section 2, it shall not make the high-risk AI system available on the market until the system has been brought into conformity with those requirements.
obligations.addressee_note: Distributor with reason to believe the system is non-conforming

decomposed_atoms.description: Non-conforming systems must not be made available on market
decomposed_atoms.requirement: Distributors SHALL NOT make a high-risk AI system available on the market if they have reason to consider it non-conforming

automation_assessment.what_to_scan: Distribution compliance review records, non-conformity flags

obligations.source_quote: Distributors shall ensure that, while a high-risk AI system is under their responsibility, storage or transport conditions, where applicable, do not jeopardise the compliance of the system with the requirements set out in Section 2.
obligations.addressee_note: Distributor responsible for a high-risk AI system

decomposed_atoms.description: Storage and transport must not jeopardise compliance
decomposed_atoms.requirement: Distributors SHALL ensure storage or transport conditions do not jeopardise compliance with Section 2 requirements

automation_assessment.what_to_scan: Storage and transport procedures, handling documentation

obligations.source_quote: Furthermore, where the high-risk AI system presents a risk within the meaning of Article 79(1), the distributor shall inform the provider or the importer of the system, as applicable, to that effect.
obligations.addressee_note: Distributor who identifies a risk in the high-risk AI system

decomposed_atoms.description: Distributor must inform provider or importer of risk
decomposed_atoms.requirement: Where the system presents a risk per Art. 79(1), the distributor SHALL inform the provider or importer

obligations.source_quote: A distributor that considers or has reason to consider, on the basis of the information in its possession, a high-risk AI system which it has made available on the market not to be in conformity with the requirements set out in Section 2, shall take the corrective actions necessary to bring that system into conformity with those requirements, to withdraw it or recall it, or shall ensure that the provider, the importer or any relevant operator, as appropriate, takes those corrective actions.
obligations.addressee_note: Distributor that has made a non-conforming system available on the market

decomposed_atoms.description: Take corrective actions to bring system into conformity, withdraw, or recall — or ensure provider/importer does so
decomposed_atoms.requirement: The distributor SHALL take corrective actions to bring the system into conformity, withdraw it, or recall it, or ensure the provider, importer, or relevant operator takes those actions

automation_assessment.what_to_scan: Corrective action records, withdrawal/recall documentation, operator correspondence

obligations.source_quote: Where the high-risk AI system presents a risk within the meaning of Article 79(1), the distributor shall immediately inform the provider or importer of the system and the authorities competent for the high-risk AI system concerned, giving details, in particular, of the non-compliance and of any corrective actions taken.
obligations.addressee_note: Distributor that identifies a risk in a system already on the market

decomposed_atoms.description: Immediately inform provider/importer and competent authorities with details of non-compliance and corrective actions
decomposed_atoms.requirement: Where the system presents a risk per Art. 79(1), the distributor SHALL immediately inform the provider or importer and the competent authorities, giving details of non-compliance and corrective actions taken

automation_assessment.what_to_scan: Risk notification records, authority correspondence, corrective action details

obligations.source_quote: Upon a reasoned request from a relevant competent authority, distributors of a high-risk AI system shall provide that authority with all the information and documentation regarding their actions pursuant to paragraphs 1 to 4 necessary to demonstrate the conformity of that system with the requirements set out in Section 2.
obligations.addressee_note: Distributor of a high-risk AI system

decomposed_atoms.description: Provide all information and documentation to demonstrate conformity upon reasoned request
decomposed_atoms.requirement: Distributors SHALL provide competent authorities, upon a reasoned request, with all information and documentation regarding actions under paragraphs 1-4 to demonstrate conformity

obligations.source_quote: Distributors shall cooperate with the relevant competent authorities in any action those authorities take in relation to a high-risk AI system made available on the market by the distributors, in particular to reduce or mitigate the risk posed by it.
obligations.addressee_note: Distributor of a high-risk AI system

decomposed_atoms.description: Cooperate with competent authorities in any action related to the system
decomposed_atoms.requirement: Distributors SHALL cooperate with competent authorities in any action taken in relation to the high-risk AI system, in particular to reduce or mitigate risks

automation_assessment.what_to_scan: Authority cooperation records, risk mitigation actions
